name: Hammered Metal Storage Patio Accent Table - Threshold™
description:
The Hammered Metal Storage Patio Accent Table from Threshold™ makes a stunning addition to your outdoor setup. Boasting a charming barrel silhouette, this accent table features a metal frame with a decorative hammered finish in gold tone for a gorgeous look that will shine brilliantly in any corner of your backyard or patio. The rust-resistant patio table invites a richness of texture into your space while still remaining functional with a round top and hidden storage inside. Ideal when combined with a chair or two to create a cozy corner, this outdoor table might also be used as a place to display a plant or other decor item.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
